calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that it has not heard from the Petitioner who has done nothing to correct the incomplete petition and nothing to address the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Continued To Mar-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Continued To Feb-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Estefani Garcia in Propria Persona.

Ms. Garcia stated that she is a medical student and is receiving financial aid, that shortly before her Father passed away he sold a piece of property in San Francisco, that when she filed the 2015 taxes it showed a large sum of money in capital gains and that she was told she will no longer qualify for student aid. Ms. Garcia also stated that when she filed the 2016 taxes the IRS rejected the filing because she does not have a Court order, that the IRS will not accept the filing without a Court order, that there is no money and that her Father gave all of the money to his Girlfriend. In addition, Ms. Garcia stated that this will cause irreparable harm to her education, that the address she has provided is the best address and that she is prepared to provide a phone number, e mail address, fax number, etc. The Court expressed concern about parties being appointed with out an Attorney and explained the difficult process in dealing with probate. Ms. Garcia stated that she was in the process of interviewing Attorneys, that she was told by two Attorneys that there is nothing in the estate for them to receive payment, that the rates are unaffordable to her, that she is also dealing with a law suit that was filed against her Father, that they are now coming after here and that she knows the next step is to do publication. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Garcia to address the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes, to provide appropriate contact information and to get an Attorney.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-11-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
